ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>The response is relevant, consistent with the persona of a suspicious and strict Gatekeeper but lacks some naturalness in tone due to its formality. Overall quality remains high despite minor issues.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>1<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>This response fails on context relevance and persona consistency, as it does not reflect the strictness or suspicion of a Gatekeeper in this scenario; overall quality is low.
